item.title: Anthropic 公开发布「Mythos 级」模型 Claude Fable 5
item.guid: Anthropic-公开发布「Mythos-级」模型-Claude-Fable-5
item.description:
Anthropic announced the launch of its new generation large model, Claude Fable 5, early this morning. The official statement claims Fable 5 is a "Mythos-level" model, open to all users after safety calibration, and has achieved the strongest performance in multiple benchmark tests across software engineering, knowledge work, scientific research, and visual tasks. Anthropic 今天凌晨宣布推出新一代大模型 Claude Fable 5。官方宣称 Fable 5 是「Mythos 级」模型，经过安全调校后面向所有用户开放，其在软件工程、知识工作、科学研究与视觉任务等多项基准测试中达到当前最强水平。

Fable 5 features a new built-in safety classification mechanism. When the system detects requests related to cybersecurity, biological and chemical research, or model distillation, it will automatically revert to Claude Opus 4.8 for a response. Fable 5 内置新的安全分级机制。当系统检测到与网络安全、生物与化学研究、模型蒸馏相关的请求时，将自动回退至 Claude Opus 4.8 响应。

Officials stated that these safety measures were deliberately set to be more conservative in the initial launch phase, with an estimated average of less than 5% of sessions triggering a fallback. Optimization will continue to reduce false positives. 官方表示，这些安全措施在上线初期被刻意设置得更为保守，预计平均不到 5% 的会话会触发回退，后续将持续优化以减少误判。

In terms of capabilities, Anthropic mentioned that Fable 5 shows significant improvements in tasks such as large-scale codebase migration, financial analysis, scientific chart interpretation, and long-context reasoning. 在能力方面，Anthropic 提到 Fable 5 在大规模代码库迁移、金融分析、科学图表解析、长上下文推理等任务中表现显著提升。

For cybersecurity and critical infrastructure protection scenarios, Anthropic simultaneously launched Mythos 5. This model shares underlying capabilities with Fable 5 but has removed safety restrictions in certain areas. 针对网络安全与关键基础设施防护场景，Anthropic 同步推出 Mythos 5。该模型与 Fable 5 共享底层能力，但在部分领域移除了安全限制。

Regarding pricing, Fable 5 and Mythos 5 cost $10 per million input tokens and $50 per million output tokens, halving the price compared to the previous Claude Mythos Preview. 定价方面，Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的费用为每百万输入 token 10 美元、每百万输出 token 50 美元，较此前的 Claude Mythos Preview 价格减半。

The term "Mythos" originates from Greek, meaning "myth." "Mythos-level" is the highest tier in Anthropic's model capability hierarchy, positioned above the Opus level. Mythos 一词源自希腊语，本意为「神话」。「Mythos 级」是 Anthropic 模型能力层级中的最高档，位于 Opus 级之上。

In April this year, Anthropic released its first Mythos-level model, Claude Mythos Preview, to a limited number of cybersecurity partners. The launch of Fable 5 now marks the first time Mythos-level capabilities are available to the public. 今年 4 月，Anthropic 曾以受限方式向少数网络安全合作伙伴发布了首款 Mythos 级模型 Claude Mythos Preview。此次 Fable 5 的推出，标志着 Mythos 级能力首次向大众开放。

item.title: 欧盟：Siri AI 不在欧洲上线是苹果自己的决定
item.guid: 欧盟：Siri-AI-不在欧洲上线是苹果自己的决定
item.description:
According to Reuters, the European Commission responded yesterday to Apple's delay in launching Siri AI features in Europe, stating that EU digital market rules do not prevent Apple from introducing relevant features locally, and Apple cannot obtain technical rule exemptions due to regulatory requirements. 据路透社报道，欧盟委员会昨日回应苹果推迟在欧洲上线 Siri AI 功能一事，称欧盟数字市场规则并不阻止苹果在当地推出相关功能，苹果不能因为监管要求而获得技术规则豁免。

Apple previously stated that some Siri AI capabilities would not be launched in the EU first, citing the need to ensure compliance with the Digital Markets Act. The EU's statement, however, pushed the responsibility back to Apple, emphasizing that whether and when to launch is a product choice for the company. 苹果此前表示，Siri AI 的部分能力不会先在欧盟推出，理由是需要确认相关功能能符合《数字市场法》要求。欧盟方面的表述则把责任重新推回苹果，强调是否上线、何时上线是公司的产品选择。

item.title: OpenAI 已保密提交 IPO 草案文件
item.guid: OpenAI-已保密提交-IPO-草案文件
item.description:
OpenAI recently announced on its official website that it has confidentially submitted a draft S-1 filing to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The company stated that it chose to make a proactive announcement due to the expectation that related documents might leak, but has not yet decided on a listing date. OpenAI 日前在官网宣布，已向美国证券交易委员会保密提交 S-1 草案文件。公司称，选择主动公告是因为预期相关文件可能外泄，但目前尚未决定上市时间。

The announcement stated that OpenAI has gained options for faster future entry into public markets while retaining room to continue pursuing certain matters as a private company. The company wrote in the announcement that whether to go public involves complex trade-offs, and at this stage, "it may still take some time." 公告称，OpenAI 已经获得未来更快进入公开市场的选项，同时仍保留继续以私有公司身份推进部分事项的空间。公司在公告中写道，是否上市涉及复杂取舍，现阶段「可能还需要一段时间」。

item.title: 苹果详解第三代基础模型，端侧 200 亿参数模型采用稀疏激活
item.guid: 苹果详解第三代基础模型，端侧-200-亿参数模型采用稀疏激活
item.description:
According to Tencent Tech, Apple further explained its third-generation Apple Foundation Models during a technical exchange after WWDC26. The model family released by Apple this time includes two on-device models, AFM 3 Core and AFM 3 Core Advanced, and three private cloud models, AFM 3 Cloud, ADM 3 Cloud, and AFM 3 Cloud Pro. 据腾讯科技报道，苹果在 WWDC26 后的技术交流中进一步解释了第三代 Apple Foundation Models。苹果这次发布的模型族包括两款端侧模型 AFM 3 Core、AFM 3 Core Advanced，以及三款私有云模型 AFM 3 Cloud、ADM 3 Cloud、AFM 3 Cloud Pro。

Among them, AFM 3 Core Advanced is a 20-billion-parameter sparse model optimized for Apple's most powerful chips, natively supporting speech synthesis, speech recognition, and visual understanding. 其中 AFM 3 Core Advanced 是一款 200 亿参数的稀疏模型，面向苹果性能最强的芯片优化，原生支持语音合成、语音识别和视觉理解。

Apple's VP of AI, Amar Subramanya, stated that this model does not swap weights word by word like typical cloud-based sparse models. Instead, it makes a single routing decision for the entire prompt, loading a small number of selected FFN expert parameters from NAND flash into DRAM for computation. 苹果 AI 副总裁 Amar Subramanya 称，这款模型不会像典型云端稀疏模型那样逐词交换权重，而是针对整个提示做一次路由决策，把少量选中的 FFN 专家参数从 NAND 闪存加载到 DRAM 中参与计算。

The cloud-based components have clearer divisions of labor: AFM 3 Cloud handles daily requests, ADM 3 Cloud is used for image generation and editing, and AFM 3 Cloud Pro is geared towards agent tool usage and complex reasoning. 云端部分分工更清晰：AFM 3 Cloud 负责日常请求，ADM 3 Cloud 用于图像生成与编辑，AFM 3 Cloud Pro 面向智能体工具使用和复杂推理。

Apple also emphasized that these models were "refined" with the help of Gemini during the training and optimization phases, but Gemini models or client code are not directly deployed in iOS. AFM 3 Cloud Pro is specifically noted as being optimized for Nvidia GPUs. 苹果同时强调，这些模型在训练和优化阶段借助 Gemini 进行「精炼」，但不是在 iOS 中直接部署 Gemini 模型或客户端代码；AFM 3 Cloud Pro 则单独标注为针对英伟达 GPU 优化。

item.title: 微信朋友圈搜索功能正式全面开放，朋友圈「考古」更方便了
item.guid: 微信朋友圈搜索功能正式全面开放，朋友圈「考古」更方便了
item.description:
According to IT Home, WeChat officially fully opened its Moments search feature yesterday. Tencent Customer Service confirmed in response to inquiries that the feature has been fully launched, aiming to help users quickly locate historical posts, and is currently available on both iOS and Android platforms. 据 IT 之家报道，微信昨日正式全面开放朋友圈搜索功能。腾讯客服在回应相关问询时确认，该功能已全量上线，旨在帮助用户快速定位历史动态，目前已覆盖 iOS 及 Android 平台。

Users can directly enter the Moments homepage, click the newly added "magnifying glass" icon in the top right corner, and enter keywords to search. Additionally, they can use the "Search" entry on WeChat's "Discover" page to directly query their own or friends' Moments content. 用户可以直接进入朋友圈主页，点击右上角新增的「放大镜」图标，输入关键词进行搜索；此外，也可以通过微信「发现」页面的「搜一搜」入口，直接查询自己或好友的朋友圈内容。

In terms of search experience, WeChat has introduced a multi-dimensional filtering mechanism. After entering keywords, users can further select "Choose Friends" or "Choose Post Time" to significantly narrow down the search range, improving the efficiency of finding old photos, specific life records, or friends' past posts. 在搜索体验上，微信引入了多维度的筛选机制。用户在输入关键词后，可以进一步勾选「选择朋友」或「选择发布时间」，从而大幅缩小搜索范围，提高查找旧照片、特定生活记录或好友往期动态的效率。

Regarding the issue of no search results reported by some users, Tencent Customer Service explained that if keywords are not mentioned in Moments, or if the relevant content involves sensitive information, search results will not be displayed normally. 针对部分用户反馈的搜索无结果问题，腾讯客服解释称，若关键词未在朋友圈中被提及，或相关内容涉及敏感信息，搜索结果将无法正常展示。

item.title: 微信 AI 生态开放接入，滴滴、美的等首批完成适配
item.guid: 微信-AI-生态开放接入，滴滴、美的等首批完成适配
item.description:
WeChat Open Class recently released the "Guidelines for Developers to Access WeChat AI Ecosystem," explaining two modes for mini-program developers to access WeChat AI. The relevant capabilities are currently still in internal testing, and developers can enable them on demand on the WeChat Open Platform. 微信公开课日前发布《关于开发者接入微信 AI 生态的指引》，面向小程序开发者说明接入微信 AI 的两种模式。相关能力目前仍处于内测阶段，开发者可在微信开放平台按需开启。

Access methods are divided into automatic mode and development mode, which are not mutually exclusive and can be enabled simultaneously. In automatic mode, the platform automatically analyzes callable pages after reading the mini-program source code, requiring no additional development; development mode requires developers to modify pages according to the documentation, enabling WeChat AI to directly operate or call relevant capabilities. 接入方式分为自动模式和开发模式，两者不互斥，可同时开启。自动模式下，平台读取小程序源码后自动分析可调用页面，无需额外开发；开发模式则需开发者按文档自行改造页面，使微信 AI 能直接操作或调用相关能力。

Didi, JD.com, Meituan, Ctrip, Tongcheng, KFC, Midea Whole House Smart, and others have announced their entry into the first batch of internal testing teams, with each focusing on the following access points: 滴滴、京东、美团、携程、同程、肯德基、美的全屋智能等已宣布进入首批内测团队，各家接入重点如下：

    Didi: Core ride-hailing services have been integrated. After users express their travel needs within WeChat, AI can recommend car models and initiate a one-click call for a ride; Express, Premium, and Special Offer services are launched first, with Hitch and Designated Driving services planned to follow.

    Midea Whole House Smart: Covers categories such as air conditioners, water heaters, washing machines, air purifiers, and range hoods. Users can control devices and query their status using natural language through the WeChat AI Agent.

🔗 Related reading: The first to bring AI OS to 1.4 billion people was actually WeChat? 🔗 相关阅读： 最先把 AI OS 带给 14 亿人的，居然是微信？

item.title: 黄仁勋随手发的零食，让韩国限定薯片卖断货
item.guid: 黄仁勋随手发的零食，让韩国限定薯片卖断货
item.description:
According to the English financial edition of The Chosun Ilbo, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's visit to South Korea unexpectedly boosted sales of Korean convenience store snacks. On June 5, after dining with several South Korean tech leaders in Hongdae, Seoul, Huang distributed "HBM potato chips," banana-flavored milk, and sweet rice punch to citizens present. 据朝鲜日报英文财经版报道，英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋访韩期间意外带动韩国便利店零食热销。6 月 5 日，黄仁勋在首尔弘大与多位韩国科技企业领袖共进晚餐后，向现场市民分发了「HBM 薯片」、香蕉味牛奶和甜米露。

7-Eleven data showed that on that day, sales of "HBM potato chips" surged by 766% compared to the same day the previous week, with a combined increase of 704% for June 6-7, and in-app search volume skyrocketed 160 times during the same period. 7-Eleven 数据显示，当日「HBM 薯片」销售额较前一周同日暴增 766%，6 至 7 日两日合计涨幅为 704%，App 内搜索量同期激增 160 倍。

Sales of banana-flavored milk and sweet rice punch increased by 12% and 13% respectively on the same day. The BBQ Hongdae Entrance store visited by Jensen Huang saw sales increase by over 20% from June 5-7 compared to the same period the previous week. 香蕉味牛奶与甜米露同日销售额分别增长 12% 和 13%。黄仁勋造访的 BBQ 弘大入口店，6 月 5 至 7 日销售额较前一周同期增逾 20%。

"HBM potato chips" are a seasonal limited-edition product launched jointly by SK Hynix and 7-Eleven. 7-Eleven stated that it is evaluating whether to produce additional quantities. 「HBM 薯片」为海力士与 7-Eleven 联名推出的季节限定产品，7-Eleven 表示正在评估是否追加生产。

item.title: 王传福：比亚迪 5 年后规模要做到全球第一
item.guid: 王传福：比亚迪-5-年后规模要做到全球第一
item.description:
BYD held its 2025 annual shareholders' meeting yesterday. Chairman and President Wang Chuanfu stated at the meeting that the automotive industry's overseas expansion is strong this year, and Chinese car companies represented by BYD are entering a development channel. The company's original annual overseas sales target was 1.6 million units, and it now appears there is an opportunity to exceed previous expectations. 比亚迪昨日召开 2025 年度股东大会。董事长兼总裁王传福在会上表示，今年汽车行业出海势头很好，以比亚迪为代表的中国车企迎来发展通道，公司原定海外年销量目标为 160 万辆，目前看来有机会超过此前预期。

Wang Chuanfu predicted that BYD would achieve greater growth by 2030, stating, "In five years, BYD will truly become the global number one in terms of scale." He attributed this growth to second-generation Blade Batteries, flash charging technology, and new technologies to be launched next year and the year after, believing that domestic and international markets will form a dual-engine drive. 王传福预计，到 2030 年，比亚迪会获得更大增长，「五年以后，比亚迪在规模上，能够做到真正的全球第一」。他把增长支撑放在二代刀片电池、闪充技术，以及明后年将推出的新技术上，认为国内外市场会形成双轮驱动。

Regarding intelligent driving, Wang Chuanfu predicted that L3 and L4 autonomous driving would be implemented ahead of schedule. BYD has prepared in terms of chips, algorithms, data, and ecosystem, and will launch compliant products once regulations are in place; training centers in Europe, South America, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East are also ready. 在智能驾驶方面，王传福判断 L3、L4 级自动驾驶会提前落地。比亚迪已从芯片、算法、数据和生态等方面做准备，若法规落地，会推出合规产品；欧洲、南美、东南亚、中东等地的训练中心也已经准备好。

item.title: Waymo 以 2.2 亿美元买下苹果自动驾驶测试场
item.guid: Waymo-以-2.2-亿美元买下苹果自动驾驶测试场
item.description:
According to TechCrunch, Waymo has acquired Apple's Castle autonomous driving test facility in California for $220 million, taking over the closed-road facility that previously served Apple's car project. 据 TechCrunch 报道，Waymo 已以 2.2 亿美元买下苹果位于加州的自动驾驶测试场 Castle，接手这处曾服务苹果汽车项目的封闭道路设施。

The Castle test facility was originally used by Apple for testing autonomous vehicles, sensors, and scenarios. After the termination of Apple's car project, the value of such closed facilities shifted to more mature autonomous driving operators: it can be used to replicate complex road conditions, test safety boundaries, train remote assistance procedures, and verify vehicle behavior before deployment on public roads. Castle 测试场原由苹果用于自动驾驶车辆、传感器和场景测试。苹果汽车项目终止后，这类封闭场地的价值转向更成熟的自动驾驶运营商：它可以用于复现复杂路况、测试安全边界、训练远程协助流程，以及在公开道路部署前验证车辆行为。

item.title: 极氪 9X 累计交付突破 6 万台
item.guid: 极氪-9X-累计交付突破-6-万台
item.description:
Zeekr announced yesterday that its flagship SUV, the Zeekr 9X, has accumulated over 60,000 deliveries, and stated that the model has topped sales of large SUVs in the 500,000-yuan class for 7 consecutive months. 极氪昨日宣布，旗下旗舰 SUV 极氪 9X 累计交付突破 6 万台，并称该车型已连续 7 个月登顶 50 万级大型 SUV 销量第一。

Zeekr also stated that the 9X simultaneously topped sales in all categories of vehicles priced above 500,000 yuan, with 1 out of every 3 vehicles sold above 500,000 yuan being a Zeekr 9X. The Zeekr 9X was launched in September last year, with a starting price of 465,900 yuan, and is available in Max, Ultra, Hyper, and Obsidian Black editions. 极氪还表示，9X 同期累计登顶 50 万元以上车型全品类销量第一，50 万元以上车型每卖出 3 台就有 1 台是极氪 9X。极氪 9X 于去年 9 月上市，起售价 46.59 万元，提供 Max、Ultra、Hyper 和曜黑版等版本。

item.title: 国家安全部提示「AI 中转站」数据风险
item.guid: 国家安全部提示「AI-中转站」数据风险
item.description:
The Ministry of State Security recently issued a security alert, warning against data security risks posed by "AI relay stations." These risks primarily arise when users access large models through third-party relay services, exposing account credentials, business data, personal privacy, or internal files to unofficial services. 国家安全部近日发布安全提示，提醒警惕「AI 中转站」带来的数据安全风险。相关风险主要来自用户通过第三方中转服务访问大模型时，把账号凭据、业务数据、个人隐私或内部文件暴露给非官方服务。

The alert pointed out that some relay services use low prices, no registration, or aggregation of multiple models as selling points, but the service providers may record user input content, save API keys, and even use sensitive information for secondary training, resale, or phishing attacks. 提示指出，一些中转服务会以低价、免注册或聚合多模型为卖点，但服务方可能记录用户输入内容、保存 API Key，甚至把敏感信息用于二次训练、转售或钓鱼攻击。

item.title: 网易支付因账户、清算和数据安全违规被罚 220.4 万元
item.guid: 网易支付因账户、清算和数据安全违规被罚-220.4-万元
item.description:
According to Bianews, the administrative penalty decision public information table of the Zhejiang Provincial Branch of the People's Bank of China shows that NetEase Pay (Hangzhou) Co., Ltd. was warned and fined 2.204 million yuan for violating regulations on account management, clearing management, data security management, and failing to conduct customer due diligence as required. 据鞭牛士报道，中国人民银行浙江省分行行政处罚决定信息公示表显示，网易支付（杭州）有限公司因违反账户管理、清算管理、数据安全管理有关规定，以及未按照规定开展客户尽职调查，被予以警告并处罚款 220.4 万元。

The penalty public information table also listed two responsible persons: Yu from NetEase Pay Technology Center was fined 45,000 yuan for violating data security management regulations; Zhu from the Anti-Money Laundering Center was fined 24,000 yuan for failing to conduct customer due diligence as required. The administrative penalty decision date is June 2, 2026. 处罚公示表还列出两名责任人：网易支付技术中心余某因违反数据安全管理规定负有责任，被罚 4.5 万元；反洗钱中心朱某因未按规定开展客户尽职调查负有责任，被罚 2.4 万元。行政处罚决定日期为 2026 年 6 月 2 日。

NetEase Pay was formerly NetEase Bao Co., Ltd., established in July 2010, and renamed NetEase Pay (Hangzhou) Co., Ltd. in June 2024. It is a licensed third-party payment institution under NetEase Group, with a registered capital of 270 million yuan, wholly owned by Guangzhou NetEase Computer System Co., Ltd. 网易支付前身为网易宝有限公司，2010 年 7 月成立，2024 年 6 月更名为网易支付（杭州）有限公司，是网易集团旗下持牌第三方支付机构，注册资本 2.7 亿元，由广州网易计算机系统有限公司全资控股。

item.title: 💡 微软 AI CEO：超级智能即将到来，但不会「抢走你的工作」
item.guid: 💡-微软-AI-CEO：超级智能即将到来，但不会「抢走你的工作」
item.description:
According to The Verge, Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman said in a podcast interview yesterday that SuperIntelligence is "coming soon," but emphasized that this does not mean a large-scale disappearance of white-collar jobs. 据 The Verge 报道，微软 AI CEO 穆斯塔法·苏莱曼（Mustafa Suleyman）昨日接受播客采访时表示，超级智能 (SuperIntelligence)「即将到来」，但强调这不意味着白领工作将大规模消失。

About four months ago, Suleyman stated in an interview with the Financial Times that "most tasks" in professions such as lawyers, accountants, and project managers would be fully automated by AI within the next 12 to 18 months, a statement that sparked widespread controversy. In response, he clarified in the interview: 苏莱曼约四个月前曾在接受《金融时报》采访时称，律师、会计、项目经理等职业的「大多数任务」将在未来 12 至 18 个月内被 AI 完全自动化，此番言论引发广泛争议。对此，他在采访中作出澄清：

I was talking about "tasks," which is a very important distinction from "jobs." This doesn't mean the position will disappear; it just means these tasks can be completed faster and more efficiently.

He believes that increased efficiency often leads to a "rebound effect" – people won't become more relaxed; instead, they will become busier and take on more creative and judgmental work. 他认为，效率提升往往带来「反弹效应」——人们不会因此更轻松，反而会变得更忙、承担更多创造性和判断性工作。

Regarding the progress of superintelligence, Suleyman stated that the current improvement in model performance follows a log-linear law: for every order of magnitude increase in computing power, model capabilities advance accordingly, a trend that has continued for over a decade. 在超级智能的进展上，苏莱曼表示，当前模型性能的提升遵循对数线性规律，算力每提升一个数量级，模型能力就会相应进步，这一趋势已持续超过十年。

He expects that with more computing power investment, models will reach human-level performance in more areas, but there is still a way to go before achieving true superintelligence that can "invent new knowledge" and "self-improve." 他预计，随着更多算力投入，模型将在更多领域达到人类水平，但距离能够「发明新知识」并「自我改进」的真正超级智能，仍有一段路要走。

item.title: 赛豆科技发布 AI 汽车品牌 AIVA，携豆包大模型入局 20 万元以上市场
item.guid: 赛豆科技发布-AI-汽车品牌-AIVA，携豆包大模型入局-20-万元以上市场
item.description:
Saidou Technology officially launched its new AI car brand AIVA and concept car AIVA Origin Concept yesterday. The first mass-produced model, AIVA ME7, will debut this year, covering the market segment above 200,000 yuan. 赛豆科技昨日正式发布全新 AI 汽车品牌 AIVA 及概念车 AIVA Origin Concept，首款量产车型 AIVA ME7 将于今年内亮相，全系覆盖 20 万元以上市场。

AIVA is launched by Saidou Technology, which was jointly established by multiple industrial capital parties including Seres and CATL. Volcengine, as a core technology partner, provides AIVA with technical services such as the Doubao large model and intelligent cockpit, participating in joint definition and design. AIVA 由赛力斯、宁德时代等多方产业资本共同参与组建的赛豆科技推出。火山引擎作为核心技术合作伙伴，为 AIVA 提供豆包大模型、智能座舱等技术服务，参与联合定义与联合设计。

The concept car AIVA Origin Concept features a streamlined body, with headlights designed as interactive, emotion-expressing "eyes," and a lidar unit mounted on the roof; the specific specifications for the mass-produced ME7 have not yet been announced. 概念车 AIVA Origin Concept 采用流线型车身，前大灯被设计为可交互、可表达情绪的「眼睛」，车顶搭载激光雷达；量产车 ME7 的具体规格尚未公布。

On the same day as the brand launch, Avatr posted on social media, stating that a "certain brand" name has appeared on the market with a design highly similar to Avatr, and declared that "Chinese automobiles cannot take the 'Ctrl+C Ctrl+V' path." 品牌发布同日，阿维塔在社交平台发文称，市场上出现「某品牌」名称在设计上与阿维塔极为相似，并称「中国汽车不能走『Ctrl+C Ctrl+V』之路」。

Avatr Technology's legal department subsequently stated that it reserves the right to pursue further legal action. Avatr did not name a specific brand in its statement, but multiple netizens in the comment section pointed the finger at AIVA. 阿维塔科技法务部随后表示将保留进一步追究法律责任的权利。阿维塔方面未在声明中点名具体品牌，但评论区多名网友将矛头指向 AIVA。

item.title: 瑞幸上线 CLI 服务
item.guid: 瑞幸上线-CLI-服务
item.description:
Luckin Coffee AI Open Platform official website shows that Luckin has launched CLI services, allowing developers to call relevant services via the terminal. It can be used by executing the installation script in a macOS terminal. 瑞幸咖啡 AI 开放平台官网显示，瑞幸已上线 CLI 服务，开发者可通过终端调用相关服务。在 macOS 终端执行安装脚本即可使用。

Luckin Coffee AI Open Platform supports multiple access methods including MCP, CLI, and Skill, aiming to integrate ordering capabilities into the AI toolchain. Previously, when Qianwen App opened up third-party Agents and Skills, Luckin was also listed as one of the first test partners, allowing users to complete product inquiries, order processing, and other operations through natural conversation. 瑞幸咖啡 AI 开放平台支持 MCP、CLI、Skill 多种接入方式，定位是把点单能力接入 AI 工具链。此前千问 App 开放第三方 Agent 和 Skill 时，瑞幸也被列为首批测试伙伴之一，用户可通过自然对话完成产品咨询、订单处理等操作。

item.title: 尊界 V800 内饰曝光，后排配现磨咖啡机
item.guid: 尊界-V800-内饰曝光，后排配现磨咖啡机
item.description:
Huawei Executive Director Richard Yu recently reposted the first official promotional video for the Zunjie V800, stating that this million-level MPV will offer "class-leading space" and a "luxurious ride" experience. The most attention-grabbing feature in the video is the integrated in-car hot beverage system in the second-row area. 华为常务董事余承东日前转发尊界 V800 首支官方宣传视频，称这辆百万级 MPV 将提供「越级空间」和「豪华驾乘」体验。视频里最受关注的配置，是二排区域集成的车载热饮系统。

From the control interface, this system not only supports freshly ground American and Italian coffee but also offers hot water and hot tea options; the second-row seat armrests are also equipped with wooden trays. Zunjie also added "crystal wall lamps" similar to hotel and private jet cabin lighting on the inside of the C-pillar, complemented by a starlight panoramic roof covering the rear. 从控制界面看，这套系统不仅支持美式和意式现磨咖啡，也提供热水和热茶选项；二排座椅扶手上还配有木纹托盘。尊界还在 C 柱内侧加入类似酒店和私人飞机舱内照明的「水晶壁灯」，并配合覆盖后排车顶的星空天幕。

According to MIIT declaration information, the Zunjie V800 has a length of 5495mm, a width of 2006mm, a height of 1850mm, and a wheelbase of 3430mm, adopting a three-row, seven-seat layout; the third-row seats can be folded back and lowered to form a completely flat storage space with the trunk floor. 工信部申报信息显示，尊界 V800 车长 5495mm、宽 2006mm、高 1850mm，轴距 3430mm，采用三排七座布局；第三排座椅可向后翻折并下沉，与后备厢地板形成纯平储物空间。

In terms of power, the entire series of this vehicle adopts a 1.5T range-extended four-wheel drive system, with front and rear dual motors having peak powers of 160kW and 230kW respectively. 动力方面，该车全系采用 1.5T 增程式四驱系统，前后双电机峰值功率分别为 160kW 和 230kW。

item.title: 荣耀 X80 Pro Max 规格曝光：11000mAh 电池和 6.78 英寸屏幕
item.guid: 荣耀-X80-Pro-Max-规格曝光：11000mAh-电池和-6.78-英寸屏幕
item.description:
Blogger "Digital Chat Station" posted an article revealing the specifications of the Honor X80 Pro Max phone, which may be released this month. 博主「数码闲聊站」发文曝光荣耀 X80 Pro Max 手机规格，该机可能在本月发布。

According to the leak, the Honor X80 Pro Max will be available in four colors: Lightning Red, Xuanjia Black, Moon Shadow White, and Vitality Orange, featuring a "flagship ID design" and supporting full-level waterproofing and a drop-resistant body. In terms of screen, the new machine will have a 6.78-inch 1.5K flat screen on the front and will be equipped with a 3D ultrasonic fingerprint sensor. 爆料称，荣耀 X80 Pro Max 将提供闪电红、玄甲黑、月影白、元气橙四种配色，采用「旗舰级 ID 设计」，支持满级防水和抗摔机身。屏幕方面，新机正面为 6.78 英寸 1.5K 直屏，搭载 3D 超声波指纹。

Regarding core configuration, the leak claims that the device will be equipped with a Qualcomm Snapdragon 6 Gen 5 processor and an 11000mAh battery. For imaging, it will feature a 64-megapixel single camera solution on the rear. 核心配置方面，爆料称该机将搭载高通骁龙 6 Gen 5 处理器，内置 11000mAh 电池。影像部分，后置为 6400 万像素单摄方案。

item.title: 小米 MiMo 推出 UltraSpeed 推理模式
item.guid: 小米-MiMo-推出-UltraSpeed-推理模式
item.description:
Xiaomi's MiMo team and the AI compilation optimization system group TileRT announced the launch of the MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed inference mode, targeting high-throughput inference for trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts models. 小米 MiMo 团队与 AI 编译优化系统组 TileRT 宣布推出 MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed 推理模式，面向 1 万亿参数混合专家模型的高吞吐推理。

According to the disclosure, this mode achieves a generation speed of over 1000 tokens per second on a single standard 8-card general-purpose GPU node. For ultra-large parameter MoE models, single-node throughput directly affects inference cost, queuing latency, and deployment threshold. 据披露，该模式在单台标准 8 卡通用 GPU 节点上实现每秒超过 1000 tokens 的生成速度。对超大参数 MoE 模型而言，单节点吞吐会直接影响推理成本、排队延迟和部署门槛。

item.title: Mind Lab 开源 749B 智能体模型 Macaron-V1-Preview
item.guid: Mind-Lab-开源-749B-智能体模型-Macaron-V1-Preview
item.description:
Mind Lab, under Xinzhou Technology, open-sourced Macaron-V1-Preview. This model has a parameter scale of 749B, including a base model of approximately 744B and adaptation parameters of about 5B; it has 40B active parameters, is based on the GLM5.1 pre-training foundation, is post-trained for Agent Harness scenarios, and provides 202K context. 心洲科技旗下 Mind Lab 开源 Macaron-V1-Preview。该模型参数规模为 749B，其中基础模型约 744B，适配参数约 5B；激活参数 40B，基于 GLM5.1 预训练底座，面向 Agent Harness 场景后训练，并提供 202K 上下文。

It is reported that Macaron-V1-Preview is optimized for real task chains, tool calling, and generative interactive interfaces, and for the first time integrates Mind Lab's previous LoRA, Agent Harness, and A2UI technologies. 据悉，Macaron-V1-Preview 面向真实任务链、工具调用和生成式交互界面优化，首次整合 Mind Lab 先前的 LoRA、Agent Harness 和 A2UI 技术。

In evaluations such as LivingBench, VitaBench, A2UI, and OpenClaw personal intelligent assistant related assessments, the team claims to have achieved leading results among open-source models. 在 LivingBench、VitaBench、A2UI 以及 OpenClaw 个人智能助理相关评测中，团队称其取得开源模型前列结果。

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/mindlab-research/Macaron-V1-Preview-749B 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/mindlab-research/Macaron-V1-Preview-749B

item.title: 美团外卖本月下旬试行店铺分新规
item.guid: 美团外卖本月下旬试行店铺分新规
item.description:
Meituan Waimai will begin piloting new "store score" rules for merchants in multiple cities later this month, adding two new food safety indicators: "store authenticity verification" and "back kitchen environment inspection," which together account for 20% of the total store score weight. 美团外卖将于本月下旬起在多个城市试行商家「店铺分」新规则，新增「门店真实性验证」和「后厨环境核验」两项食品安全指标，两项合计占店铺分总权重 20%。

The rules state that if a merchant fails to complete store authenticity verification within 180 days, the score for this item will be zero; if the back kitchen environmental hygiene verification is not passed, the environmental information item will also receive zero points. Meituan will also remove some repetitive indicators from the merchant evaluation system, including negative review replies, online contact replies, and order rejections. 规则显示，商家若未在 180 天内完成门店真实性验证，该项得分为零；未通过后厨环境卫生核验，环境信息项同样得零分。美团同时将下线商家评价体系中的部分重复性指标，涉及差评回复、在线联系回复、不接单等。

The store score will affect the platform traffic, activity registration, and risk of demotion or removal for food delivery merchants. 店铺分会影响外卖商家的平台流量、活动报名和降权清退风险。

item.title: 星巴克首推「非遗妈妈周」主题活动
item.guid: 星巴克首推「非遗妈妈周」主题活动
item.description:
Starbucks China announced the launch of its first "Starbucks Intangible Cultural Heritage Mother's Week" themed event. From June 9th to 14th, the event will take place in 7 intangible cultural heritage concept stores and over 1500 handicraft interest stores nationwide. This event is jointly organized by Starbucks China and "Intangible Cultural Heritage Mothers," with the theme "This Cup, See Intangible Cultural Heritage." 星巴克中国宣布首次开启「星巴克非遗妈妈周」主题活动，6 月 9 日至 14 日，活动落地全国 7 家非遗概念店及超过 1500 家手工兴趣门店。这次活动由星巴克中国携手「非遗妈妈」展开，主题为「这一杯，见非遗」。

Li Huanzhi and Chen Yanqiu, two intangible cultural heritage mothers deeply involved in the "Intangible Cultural Heritage Inheritance and Rural Women Empowerment" project, will visit Starbucks intangible cultural heritage concept stores in Suzhou, Nanjing, and Hangzhou to share their intangible cultural heritage experiences; store partners will also act as "intangible cultural heritage speakers" to lead customers in understanding intangible cultural heritage content. 两位深度参与「非遗传承与乡村女性赋能」项目的非遗妈妈李换芝、陈艳秋，将走进苏州、南京、杭州的星巴克非遗概念店，分享非遗经历；门店伙伴也会以「非遗主讲人」身份带领顾客了解非遗内容。

The event also includes handicraft workshops and limited-edition merchandise. Customers can experience intangible cultural heritage weaving techniques and make Dragon Boat Festival bamboo woven dragon boat pendants; the "Intangible Cultural Heritage Craft Series" limited-edition merchandise, co-created by Starbucks and intangible cultural heritage mothers, is also available in nearly 100 Starbucks Reserve stores nationwide, including refrigerator magnets, cardholders, T-shirts, tote bags, and more. 活动还包含手工教室和限定商品。顾客可体验非遗编织技艺，制作端午竹编龙舟挂件；星巴克与非遗妈妈共创的「非遗匠心手作系列」限定商品，也在全国近 100 家臻选门店上市，品类包括冰箱贴、卡包、T 恤、托特包等。

item.title: 《一个部门的诞生》定档 6 月 27 日
item.guid: 《一个部门的诞生》定档-6-月-27-日
item.description:
The movie "The Birth of a Department" officially announced its release date for June 27th, simultaneously releasing the "I want to cut the stage" version of the trailer. 电影《一个部门的诞生》官宣定档 6 月 27 日，并同步释出「我要 cut 台」版定档预告。

In the trailer, the protagonist De Zai (played by Dai Yuqi) encounters numerous obstacles when trying to unsubscribe from a TV package, and by a strange coincidence, is mistaken for a robber, leading to a series of absurd comedic plots. 预告片中主角德仔（戴玉麒 饰）因退订电视套餐遭遇重重阻碍，阴差阳错之下被误认为劫匪，由此引发一系列荒诞喜剧情节。

item.title: 中国首部喜剧探案动画电影《大唐妖探》定档 8 月 8 日
item.guid: 中国首部喜剧探案动画电影《大唐妖探》定档-8-月-8-日
item.description:
China's first comedy detective animated film "Detective Di in the Tang Dynasty" announced yesterday that it will be released nationwide on August 8th. 中国首部喜剧探案动画电影《大唐妖探》昨日宣布定档 8 月 8 日全国上映。

The film is directed by Cheng Teng and co-directed by Huang Min, with Lei Songran and Zhang Cheng (in no particular order) leading the voice cast. Set in Chang'an City, the story follows young detective Di Shao and intern constable A Sa, who are forced to team up due to a series of bizarre murder cases. In their pursuit of the truth, they gradually uncover secrets hidden deep within Chang'an City. 影片由程腾执导、黄珉联合导演，雷淞然、张呈（排名不分先后）领衔声音出演。故事以长安城为背景，讲述少年神探狄少与实习捕快阿萨因一连串离奇命案被迫结成搭档，二人在追查真相的过程中逐渐揭开藏于长安城深处的秘密。

Visually, the film creates a "Mechanism Chang'an" visual system, combining traditional architectural aesthetics with mechanical design, presenting high-altitude cable cars traveling between flying eaves and upturned corners, a shimmering Dragon Palace bathhouse, and fantastical scenes of a hundred demons roaming at night. 视觉层面，影片打造了「机关长安」视觉体系，将传统建筑美学与机关设计相结合，呈现穿行于飞檐斗拱间的高空缆车、水光潋滟的龙宫浴场以及百妖夜行的奇幻场景。
